scenario_note: Nominal label derived from batch size (1 -> SingleStream, else Offline). This is NOT enforced by MLPerf LoadGen: the container runs its own warmup/iterations loop and does not apply LoadGen timing constraints, so results are a supplemental energy methodology, not a certified benchmark.
notice: Not a certified benchmark result. Energy reported in an MLCommons-style format. MLCOMMONS, MLPERF, and MLCUBE are trademarks of MLCommons Association, referenced here nominatively.
measurement_source: ILLUSTRATIVE (synthetic) — shows the shape of the on-GPU measured output; NOT a real measurement

results.note: ILLUSTRATIVE synthetic values, provided only to document the measured-path output format. Numbers are not from a real run.
